mailingAddress.street: 1 Chahar Taq Way, Atash Behram Quarter

roles.name: Mobed-e Mobedan
roles.description: Chief priest of architecture — guards the eternal flame of the over-arching Salesforce solution.

roles.name: Spahbod of Delivery
roles.description: Marshal of the host — keeps the timeline, the muster, and answers to the Shahanshah.

roles.name: Dabir of the Royal Diwan
roles.description: Scribe-keeper of the Diwan — records, layouts, fields, and permission sets.

roles.name: Forger of the Kaviani Banner
roles.description: Smith of Apex, LWC, and platform craft — hammers code as Kaveh hammered the standard.

roles.name: Vizier of the Western Court
roles.description: Vizier over all Salesforce craft of the West — sets the firmān and guides the senior smiths.

roles.name: Asvaran of Ctesiphon
roles.description: Heavy cavalry of consulting — patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced lance.

roles.name: Paighan of the Marches
roles.description: Foot levy — carries discovery and configuration across the satrapy under the Asvaran's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-Architect of Khwarazm
roles.description: Architect of the great spans across the Oxus — designs integrations between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Pol-Sazan of the Tigris
roles.description: Master bridge-builder of the Tigris — lays APIs, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Architect's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Pol-Sazan
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the patterns of Sasanian error handling.

roles.name: Bazresi of the Houses
roles.description: Inspector of the houses of build — finds the maladies before they reach the throne room.

roles.name: Herbad of the Heralds
roles.description: Senior priest of proclamation — leads the criers of product and message across the empire.

roles.name: Crier of the Apadana
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call from the great audience hall.

roles.name: Bearer of the Derafsh
roles.description: Carries the campaign banner into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Council Scribe of Estakhr
roles.description: Records what the satraps need and what is promised — translates between mortal customer and the priestly craft of design.

roles.name: Master Smith of Hamadan
roles.description: Senior forge-master of the West — shapes the deepest Apex enchantments and mentors the apprentices.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Diwan
roles.description: Newly arrived at the royal court — learns clicks-not-code and the etiquette of declarative Salesforce.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set. The four realms map roughly to the four-fold cosmos of Mazdayasna: the Holy Immortals, the lesser divine yazatas, the demonic daevas, and the heroic age of the Shahnameh.

workstreams.name: Discovery in the House of Song

children.name: Survey of the Seven Trials (Haft Khan)
Strategy in the Court of Kai Khosrow

workstreams.name: Testing on the Plains of Mazandaran

ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.name: Kindling of the Eternal Flame
ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.description: Discovery sign-off — the Atash Behram is lit at Garothman.

ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.name: Forging of the Bounteous Plan
ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.description: Build kickoff: the seven Amesha Spentas convene to shape the design.

ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.name: Audience in the House of Song
ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.description: Mid-project gate: stewardship review at the throne of Wisdom.

ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.name: Crossing the Chinvat Bridge
ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.description: Phase invoice: souls of the build weighed and tolled.

ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.name: Frashokereti — Renewal
ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.description: Go-Live: the world made fresh and the platform unveiled.

ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.name: Hand-off to the Saoshyant
ahura-mazda-and-amesha-spentas.description: Hyper-care close: stewardship passed to the future-saviour.

yazatas-and-divine-beings.name: Sounding of the Sraosha Bell
yazatas-and-divine-beings.description: Project kickoff: the Listener calls the muster of yazatas.

yazatas-and-divine-beings.name: Tishtrya's Rains Begin
yazatas-and-divine-beings.description: Build phase: the star-yazata releases the waters of momentum.

yazatas-and-divine-beings.name: Mehregan Festival Gate
yazatas-and-divine-beings.description: UAT gate: the autumn feast of Mithra — covenants tested.

yazatas-and-divine-beings.name: Verethragna's Tenfold Victory
yazatas-and-divine-beings.description: Go-Live: the smiter of resistance breaks every blocker.

yazatas-and-divine-beings.name: Anahita Pours the Waters
yazatas-and-divine-beings.description: Hyper-care close: the lady of waters blesses the launch.

yazatas-and-divine-beings.name: Tribute at the Apadana
yazatas-and-divine-beings.description: Final invoice: tribute laid before the assembled yazatas.

daevas-and-evil-spirits.name: Angra Mainyu Stirs
daevas-and-evil-spirits.description: Discovery: the counter-spirit awakens, threats catalogued.

daevas-and-evil-spirits.name: Forge the Lie-Lenses
daevas-and-evil-spirits.description: Build: Druj's deception network deployed across the pit.

daevas-and-evil-spirits.name: Aeshma's Wrathful Audit
daevas-and-evil-spirits.description: Solution review with the demon of fury himself.

daevas-and-evil-spirits.name: The Daevas Are Bound
daevas-and-evil-spirits.description: Project close: the demonic horde sealed beneath the earth.

daevas-and-evil-spirits.name: Final Reckoning of the Pit
daevas-and-evil-spirits.description: Final invoice from the House of the Lie.

shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.name: Audience with Kai Khosrow
shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.description: Kickoff council in the royal court of the Kayanids.

shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.name: Rostam's Seven Trials Begin
shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.description: Discovery: the Haft Khan are mapped to project risks.

shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.name: Forge the Throne of Jamshid
shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.description: Build: the takht assembled from the lapis of the Diwan.

shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.name: Coronation at Estakhr
shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.description: UAT acceptance: the crown is placed; the farr shines.

shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.name: Bahram Gor's Royal Hunt
shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.description: Go-Live + handoff: the Shah rides forth on the inaugural hunt.

shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.name: Tribute to the Treasury
shahnameh-heroes-and-shahs.description: Final invoice paid into the royal khazaneh.

Ahura Mazda.notes: Contemplation of the Bounteous Creation — quarterly retreat.

Spenta Armaiti.notes: Tending the holy earth — devotional gardening.

Haurvatat.notes: Pilgrimage to the headwaters — wholeness sabbatical.

Anahita.notes: Annual blessing of the rivers — Aredvi Sura attendance.

Tishtrya.notes: Battle with Apaosha for the rains — five-day duel.

Sraosha.notes: Silent vigil — listening to the prayers of the world.

Angra Mainyu.notes: Plotting in the northern dark — strategic seclusion.

Aka Manah.notes: Brooding on evil thought — undisturbed contemplation.

Rostam.notes: Tending Rakhsh in the pastures of Zabulistan.

Sohrab.notes: Visiting Tahmineh in Samangan — mother's day off.

Zal.notes: Counsel with the Simurgh on Mount Damavand.

Tahmineh.notes: Pilgrimage to the shrine at Samangan.
